ab: ku nagane li ki sya Muakai.
ku nagane ki ama sya Legeai.
ku nagane ki ina sya Alaelrepe.
tangea ku kake ka sauwalai, sya Sakinu. tahamangealanga si ea ku caili ini.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Sakinu，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Sakinu, he is 11 years old.

ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: kunaku si kake tahamadalame nai senai.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: madalama ku lwangui, lu taibalribalriva, mahedele nai ka wacekecekele lwangui.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: madalama ku kisudalru ku bauwa ka talrailragi, wadulru madu taelre senai si langui.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
